content.en:
If you take the physical tribulation as a realm, it is above the third level of the strongest person.

Then, Ye Tian is now the strongest person in the Second Tribulation Realm of the Flesh Body, and the strength of the Flesh Body will skyrocket a lot every time he crosses the Tribulation, and it is precisely because of this that the Strongest Ancestor will become so powerful after becoming an invincible Ancestor.

Above the Five Tribulations Realm of the Flesh or the Five Tribulations of the Soul, you can go to the Exotic World, strain the rules of the Exotic, and rely on all kinds of life-preserving things to try to make the physical body change qualitatively again and again, at least so that you will not fall under the suppression of the Exotic Rules, which is qualified.

After that, it was to use a hundred Origin Rule Robbery Crystals to impact the realm of an invincible person like the Invincible Ancestor.

Once successful, you are truly invincible.

These three steps are getting more and more difficult step by step, and many of the strongest people don't know how many times they have survived the Great Tribulation, how many times they have encountered danger to their lives, and with the help of great forces, they have a glimmer of hope to be promoted to the realm of invincibles.

If you let others know that Ye Tian had raised his physical body to the second tribulation realm of the physical body in a short period of time, they would definitely not believe it!

Because any supreme powerhouse absorbs the tribulation power very slowly, and there is almost no way to improve it, but Ye Tian has obtained the eternal talent tribulation, which can quickly absorb the refining tribulation power, so that the physical body can be raised to the second tribulation realm of the physical body in a short period of time.

If he went to a few more exotic worlds where the Great Tribulation occurred, he would definitely be able to raise his physical body to the Nine Tribulation Realm.

Soon, the catastrophe of the Dark Forbidden Realm passed.

From beginning to end, the invincible people of the six super-name-level forces did not descend on the Dark Forbidden Domain, which made Ye Tian breathe a sigh of relief.

From the information learned by the six major forces, the invincible is afraid that they can enter the foreign world during the non-catastrophe, how terrifying the strength is, and the invincible of the six super-famous forces is definitely not the first to enter the invincible realm, so the strength is definitely much stronger than the tribulation beast.

Therefore, he is definitely no match for the invincible.

But now, the invincible didn't come, and it is estimated that he has no interest in thousands of Origin Rule Robbery Crystals, plus he has other things or is in retreat and cultivation, so he has not descended on the Dark Forbidden Domain.

Now that the Dark Forbidden Tribulation has passed, even if the invincible person comes, he will not be afraid.

After all, during the non-catastrophe period, even if the invincible person comes, his strength will inevitably be suppressed very strongly, and he is not even as strong as him, and coming here is to seek death.

In this catastrophe, the strength of the human race was almost not lost, but the other forces were almost annihilated, and only a few ancestors remained.

Whoa!!!

One after another ancestors of the Terran came out of the Terran territory, crossed time and space, and went to the borders of the Dark Forbidden Realm, but what they saw was desolation and silence.

In a short period of time, those treasure lands and realms of the Dark Forbidden Realm will not be born, and it will take a certain amount of time for these realms, worlds, treasure lands, and dark holy lands to be born.

Therefore, the cultivators of the Terran race will only live in the territory of the Terran in the next few years, although it will be very crowded, but it will be enough for the time being.

Moreover, the ancestors of the Terrans could create worlds in the surrounding territories, and even accelerate the evolution of the realms, so the Terrans did not lack territory.

this day.

Ye Tian summarized and sorted out all the evolutionary paths of the human race from the first ancestor, the strongest ancestor and the invincible ancestor, and sealed it in the human temple by special means, but all those who have no superior domain ancestor are qualified to inherit these secret knowledge, and they will not go the wrong way, so that they will not be promoted to the strongest ancestor and invincible ancestor in the future.

In the following time, the human race would give birth to some peerless domain ancestors every once in a while, and even one after another unsurpassed peak domain ancestors with full background were promoted to ancestors, and they were all promoted to ancestors from the founding ancestor method.

Because everyone's comprehension has skyrocketed after surviving the catastrophe, even Ye Tian's comprehension has improved a lot, this is the benefit of surviving the catastrophe.

It is conceivable that it will not be too long before the human race will give birth to a large number of ancestors, and as for the unsurpassed domain ancestors, there are really as many as a cow's hair.

Coupled with the fact that Ye Tian had obtained a lot of Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals this time, he naturally couldn't ask for so many of them, and he could completely put them in the Terran Temple for those top ancestors of the Terran Race to slowly comprehend.

I'm afraid it will be impossible to give birth to the strongest ancestor in a short period of time, but if the years go on, one great tribulation is nine dark calendars that can't give birth to a supreme ancestor, but if multiple great tribulations pass, the supreme ancestor will definitely be born, and even more and more will follow.

......

There was no catastrophe in the Dark Forbidden Domain, and Ye Tian couldn't absorb the power of the catastrophe, and he didn't know which exotic world would have a catastrophe, so during this period of time, he began to create the ultimate ancestral technique, and then fused it into the supreme ancestral technique.

He himself had obtained several Origin Rule Robbery Crystals from other exotic worlds, all of which were obtained by killing the strongest people in other exotic worlds.

In addition, he can continue to trade the Origin Rule Heist Crystal, and with his current strength, he can definitely easily trade the Exotic Origin Rule Heist Crystal.

As a result, he now has no shortage of Exotic Origin Rule Raiding Crystals.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian created more and more Xeon Ancestral Techniques, although the effect of Xeon Ancestral Skills on him became weaker and weaker, but if he created more, he could still improve his strength.

Occasionally, he could also help his wife and son create the Ultimate Ancestral Technique, guiding them to fuse the two Ultimate Ancestral Techniques, so that they could comprehend and create a Supreme Ancestral Technique, which would at least help them save countless years.

Time passed year by realm, and the Dark Forbidden Domain slowly prospered, and the dense realm was born, so that the entire Dark Forbidden Domain was no longer empty.

Moreover, many forbidden creatures were also born, but they would only be reduced to the resources of the human race, hunted and captive in large numbers by the strong of the human race.

At the same time, countless Terrans were also assigned to super-large realms and large realms, and some small realms were also full of traces of Terrans.

Moreover, Ye Tian took the time to build a space-time gate at the level of the strongest ancestor, which could divide countless space-time gate phantoms, so that the human race could easily travel to and from all parts of the Dark Forbidden Domain, otherwise it would be difficult for even if there was no high-level domain ancestor, it would be difficult to cross the long territory.

Unconsciously, the human race gave birth to many ancestors and countless unsurpassed domain ancestors.

And Ye Tian also had a total of nearly forty Supreme Ancestral Techniques, making it impossible for the Supreme Ancestral Technique to increase his physical body, and there was no need to continue to create the Supreme Ancestral Technique.

At this time, he had no way to improve his strength except for the physical tribulation.

So, he began to find a way to inquire which exotic world was about to give birth to the Great Tribulation.
